name: Hardware and Software System Requirements
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can ensure optimal retail operations performance and reliability by selecting hardware and software configurations that meet "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " system requirements, helping your POS and back office systems run efficiently across multiple device types. Properly configured hardware typically delivers faster transaction processing, improved system stability, and better overall retail operations efficiency."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Understanding hardware compatibility requirements helps retail operators make informed technology investment decisions for their physical retail locations, ensuring receipt printing, barcode scanning, and EFTPOS integration work reliably across Windows, Mac, and tablet environments used in Australian and New Zealand retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express is a browser-based application designed to work on multiple hardware platforms and Internet Browsers. To provide the best possible user experience and functionality, the system has been developed to be cross-browser compatible using the latest web technologies."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "The Retail Express POS solution is also designed to work on iPad tablets to allow retailers to engage their customers more actively on the showroom floor and improve the sales experience."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppO51EAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppO51EAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "blobid0 (11).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "For more detailed information, including a full and current list of supported POS Terminals, Operating Systems, and hardware please see the documentation included as an attachment at the end of this article."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Internet Browsers"}], "data-id": "internet-browsers"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express is a cloud-based system, accessed by an Internet Browser on your computer or device. "Hardware Requirements"}], "data-id": "hardware-requirements"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The hardware requirements for using Retail Express are as follows:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Computer System/PC", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " "}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Minimum requirements:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Intel I3 Quad Core or Higher, AMD Quad Core or Higher"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "8GB Ram or higher (16GB recommended for optimal performance)"}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Monitor", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "VGA"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "HDMI"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "DVI"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Minimum of 15 inches (we recommend at least 21 inches or larger, as the bigger the screen the easier it will be to review reports without scrolling)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Smaller devices will work (Microsoft Surface etc) however you may need to zoom out on the browser to view all features successfully e.g. POS."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "1024 x 768 resolution (preferred resolution is 1920 x 1080)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Touch screens are compatible with Retail Express, however, can be much more expensive. The same resolution recommendations apply to touch screens."}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Barcode Scanner", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "USB"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Com/Serial"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "LPT/Parallel"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express is compatible with most standard barcode scanners (both corded and wireless). Installation is usually as simple as just plugging the scanner into an available USB port."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Receipt Printer", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "USB"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Com/Serial"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "LPT/Parallel"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you plan on using a receipt printer it "}, {"text": "must ", "bold": true}, {"text": "be an "Epson Compatible" printer. It must also be connected to your PC via one of the listed connections."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Alternatively, you can print A4 Tax Invoices and Receipts via a standard A4 Inkjet or Laser Printer."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Cash Drawer", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "RJ11"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you plan on using a cash drawer, it's recommended to be connected via an RJ11 cable to your Receipt Printer (for the cash drawer to automatically open). It "}, {"text": "cannot ", "bold": true}, {"text": "be connected directly to your computer."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You cannot plug a cash drawer directly into a USB port on your computer - it will not work with Retail Express. "}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Barcode Label Printer", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "COM/Serial"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "LPT/Parallel"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "USB via virtual COM port"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you plan on printing your own barcode labels you can select from either of the following 2 options:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use a standard A4 inkjet or laser printer and purchase label sticker sheets (not recommended)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use an EPL-compatible Zebra Label Printer (required)"}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Operating System", "bold": true}]}]}, operating systems:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Windows 10"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Windows 11"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Windows XP, 7, 8 or Windows 10 Enterprise are not supported."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Spreadsheets", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " "}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For using some of the Back Office features of Retail Express (Excel Scan Stocktake, PO Matrix etc - anything utilising macro functionality) we highly recommend using Windows Microsoft Excel (non-cloud based e.g. Office 365)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "While other spreadsheet software (Open Office etc) may still offer basic functionality, not all advanced features in the Excel files will be available in other programs, including Apple mac versions of Excel."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Web
